G10.note: this should arc from neck side to neck side passing through neck front point

H06.note:
start like H05 at an angle towards apex and then follow that same angle to waist
kind of like K01 but using the angle dictated by the apex

H16.note: like H15 but should point toward apex and end at G03 line

H25.note: use SurfacePlumb from waist center back up to same X on lowbust level

H37.note: vertical height line from shoulder tip perpendicular to floor up to Y of neck side point

H39.note: vertical height line from shoulder tip perpendicular to floor up to Y of neck back point

I03.note: should be at same X as armscye points but 2/3 of height between front neck point and center front point of G03

I08.note: should be at same X as armfold to armfold, but 2/3 between neck back point and I09

J03.note: this seems a bit too short, are you sure its touching the line at G05

L13.note: should be on left arm (mirror point for bicep)

P09.note: should curve down to touch center point of bust circ G04 from the armfolds
